original_claim: Internal governance cannot establish confirmatory independence and independent custody is required
exact_existing_tests: Stage 4A lock hash tests; source-order holdout tests
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A is exploratory and its internal hashes establish tamper evidence rather than independent blinding
prospective_relevance: High; stronger holdout release governance remains available before 2026-2028 access
evidence: Human authorization and hashed lock predate access; custody is self-administered
notes: Offer independent custodian; third-party key; timestamped one-shot package; or audited release controls without claiming any is implemented

original_claim: Exposure and eBird sampling are one shared human-effort process and same-observer or same-location designs must be primary
exact_existing_tests: Stage 4A output and validation gate tests
stage4a_relevance: E01 remains conditional checklist reporting; M26 M32 and M40 were executed but M26 does not estimate exposure-related visitation and none is a universal correction
prospective_relevance: High for future observation-process design
evidence: M26 aggregates checklist counts by event block and year but fits year only; M32 and M40 are non-null
notes: Separate ecological event; DFO observation; checklist location/submission; checklist effort; observer skill; and common causes

original_claim: No recorded event is not true absence so DFO survey effort is required before any response model
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A contrasts are conditional on recorded linked events and do not establish surveyed-negative controls
prospective_relevance: Required for future true no-spawn comparisons
evidence: Stage 4A uses active near versus contemporaneous linked reference and frozen event strata; it does not label unmonitored shoreline as surveyed negative
notes: Not a universal blocker for historical within-recorded-event associations

original_claim: The prospective holdout lacks a power analysis
stage4a_relevance: No effect on executed Stage 4A development estimates
prospective_relevance: High; confirmation cells need metadata-only MDE or assurance before lock
evidence: No prospective power artifact is tracked
notes: Use response-free support and simulation assumptions; do not open holdout outcomes

original_claim: A directional ecological hypothesis invalidates negative controls and controls should be diversified
stage4a_relevance: The two-taxon panel is not guaranteed inert and was non-null in SoG; direction labels did not select reported Stage 4A results
prospective_relevance: High for prospective control selection and claim hierarchy
evidence: All activated results are reported regardless of sign; specificity taxa were explicitly not assumed biological nonresponders
notes: Directional predictions are allowed but cannot drive taxon model or reporting selection

original_claim: Source-point geometry makes H2 and H5 unidentified and shoreline geometry must be added
stage4a_relevance: Source-point distance is defined but error-prone; M05 ring contrasts are representation-specific and H5 intensity models were deferred
prospective_relevance: Possible separately authorized timing or geometry sensitivity
evidence: Human authorization selected immutable source points only after documenting incomplete shoreline coverage
notes: Do not retrofit shoreline geometry into Stage 4A v1

original_claim: Stage 4A placebos use plus or minus 14-day shifts inside a 42-day kernel
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A used cyclic shifts rather than plus or minus 14 days; however shifts were global token-order shifts and row-level GLMs instead of within-region-year matched-family placebos
prospective_relevance: Register kernel-specific and event-specific placebo rules prospectively
evidence: Lines creating false_date_active and false_location_active sort by analysis token and shift the full regional vector; the locked spec says within-region-year order and matched primary family
notes: Affects 32 M27 or M28 diagnostic rows and interpretation; core M01 M02 M05 M08 estimates remain unchanged

original_claim: An unresolved biological event-complex rule and union-find chaining corrupt Stage 4A uncertainty blocks
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A validation blocks deliberately union all source events concurrently linked to a checklist; they are leakage blocks not biological event complexes
prospective_relevance: Biological event grouping may be considered separately for other estimands
evidence: All concurrent source links and checklists remain on one fold; event-block overlap is zero
notes: Anti-chaining a validation block would permit linked information to cross folds and is not justified

original_claim: Raw spawn-component sums are incomparable across records and corrupt Stage 4A dose response
stage4a_relevance: M18 and M19 intensity or component models were deferred and Stage 4A production never reads relative_spawn_index
prospective_relevance: High for future dose-response work
evidence: Generic code retains component missingness and returns NA only when all components are missing
notes: Future models must use component and method-matched or measurement-error approaches

original_claim: Stage 4A lacks numeric cross-family claim thresholds and cross-family multiplicity
exact_existing_tests: Stage 4A output tests; post-Stage4A synthetic pooling-family audit
stage4a_relevance: BH was applied within locked model-specific families and the individual estimates standard errors confidence intervals p values and q values remain interpretable; however the reported partial-pool columns were computed in families defined only by region outcome and contrast and therefore mix model IDs unit classes and duplicated M11 or M12 component rows
prospective_relevance: High; the claim hierarchy and each pooling family need explicit prospective definition
evidence: All 84 region-outcome-contrast groups with computed pooling values contain more than one model ID or unit class across 4890 released rows; active-near groups mix M01 M02 M11 or M12 and M29 where present
notes: Impact is confined to partial_pool_estimate and partial_pool_standard_error and any synthesis based on them; the released individual estimates and multiplicity columns were not overwritten and no protected rerun was performed

original_claim: Exposure-correlated misclassification is universal and ambiguity was folded into detection
stage4a_relevance: Ambiguity masks become structural unknowns and never zeros; differential misclassification remains plausible and taxon-specific
prospective_relevance: Potential future sensitivity for confusable taxa
evidence: The active materializer sets detection to NA for masked omissions and keeps X detection-only
notes: No evidence establishes universal exposure-correlated error

original_claim: Traveling checklists up to 5 km are incompatible with 0 to 0.5 km rings
stage4a_relevance: M05 fine-ring interpretation is route-footprint limited; the 2 km sensitivity is better aligned but still was not fit with the matched primary family
prospective_relevance: Model-specific effort gates can be registered
evidence: Primary allows travel at most 5 km; high-precision flag allows at most 2 km
notes: Do not apply a blanket gate to 5 km active-near models

original_claim: Checklist-event linkage uses public row positions without cardinality assertions
stage4a_relevance: The generic R helper is defective but Stage 4A used hashed analysis-event and immutable source tokens from the C sharp builder with unique pair assertions
prospective_relevance: Relevant to future R linkage paths
evidence: Stage 3 ValidateLinks asserts unique checklist by source pairs and finite bounded distances
notes: Fix generic helper using analysis_checklist_id and source_record_id; do not rename an analysis ID to sampling_event_identifier

original_claim: Missing zero-fill eligibility silently defaults every checklist to eligible
exact_existing_tests: eBird ingestion and Stage 4A factorization tests
stage4a_relevance: The generic helper fails open but Stage 4A used a separate locked factorized materializer over an already eligible event frame
prospective_relevance: Relevant to future denominator paths
evidence: zero_fill_taxa currently defaults to TRUE when the field is absent; Stage 4A never calls it
notes: Require exact binary eligibility and complete unique IDs

original_claim: Duplicate natural event IDs must be rejected as duplicate biological events
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A uses immutable source-row-derived tokens rather than event_id; generic code should require source-record identity but must not reject legitimate repeated natural keys
prospective_relevance: Relevant to future event grouping
evidence: Stage 3 tokens include source row and source metadata; no Stage 4A collapse by event_id occurs
notes: Biological event grouping requires an explicit crosswalk

original_claim: A 20 km candidate radius truncates a 10 km exponential kernel at material weight
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A used discrete source-point rings and no exponential or Gaussian kernel; M17 was deferred
prospective_relevance: Future kernel models require exposure-level truncation audit
evidence: No call from protected builder or production pipeline reaches generic kernel functions
notes: Radius-only boundary weight is insufficient; compare cumulative production and wider-radius exposure

original_claim: The herring quality function names a relative index egg thickness
stage4a_relevance: Semantic naming defect only; active Stage 4A does not call the generic function or use intensity
prospective_relevance: Future metadata clarity
evidence: relative_spawn_index is passed to the egg_thickness parameter
notes: Rename to intensity_index without changing values

original_claim: Single primary guild membership is an engineering defect
stage4a_relevance: Single primary membership prevents double counting in M01; multi-label mechanism traits remain separate
prospective_relevance: Traits may support future second-stage models
evidence: Exactly eight primary guilds are frozen and used once per taxon
notes: Do not retrofit duplicate guild membership into historical results

original_claim: Richness and lower-bound counts can disagree
stage4a_relevance: Expected difference between detection richness and numeric lower-bound estimands
prospective_relevance: Retain tests and definitions
evidence: X contributes to detection richness and has unknown numeric magnitude
notes: Divergence is not a weakness

original_claim: Outcome-balanced spatiotemporal subsampling is mandatory before response models
stage4a_relevance: Not part of locked Stage 4A and not required for interpretability of all models
prospective_relevance: Optional future sensitivity with inclusion probabilities or recalibration
evidence: No such sampling was used; Stage 4A retained the complete eligible frame
notes: Never balance outcomes without known sampling weights or recalibration

original_claim: Observer expertise must be added as a nuisance covariate
stage4a_relevance: Not in Stage 4A locked predictors; adding it now is post-result
prospective_relevance: Possible future covariate if built from pre-period data or cross-fitting
evidence: Stage 4A uses observer clusters and prior frozen observer folds; no response-derived expertise score
notes: Must not learn expertise from 2026-2028 outcomes

original_claim: A shared-latent preferential-sampling model must replace visitation diagnostics
stage4a_relevance: Transparent M26 was authorized but its implementation reports event-block visitation counts without exposure association; it cannot support the intended bias diagnostic
prospective_relevance: Joint models are optional and need a defined parameter plus identifiability simulation
evidence: M26 uses quasipoisson rather than registered negative binomial and has no exposure coefficient or blocked validation
notes: Repair M26 in a new versioned diagnostic package if authorized

original_claim: Target-group background corrects DFO presence-only exposure
stage4a_relevance: Presence-only SDM background for the response sampling process does not identify DFO survey-negative exposure
prospective_relevance: None unless separately justified for another estimand
evidence: DFO survey effort requires observed survey coverage and outcomes
notes: Request surveyed positive; surveyed negative; and unmonitored states instead

original_claim: The additive herring kernel is a fusion design and should be primary because another study found more power
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A did not use a kernel and external power claims do not transfer identification
prospective_relevance: Future continuous exposure remains an option on its own estimand
evidence: The cited design has an independently measured exposure process unlike DFO presence-only records
notes: Do not use fusion terminology

original_claim: Near and outer controls may be affected by redistribution interference
stage4a_relevance: M08 is an active-near minus contemporaneous-reference association and does not identify unaffected controls or regional mass balance
prospective_relevance: High for M07 M08 and M45 development
evidence: Regional totals and allocation models M07 and M45 were deferred
notes: Separate local reporting; regional allocation; and regional totals

original_claim: Spawn can change whether where and how a checklist is submitted
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A estimates reporting conditional on an eligible submitted checklist; M26 does not identify zero-submission shoreline-days
prospective_relevance: High for future visitation and submission models
evidence: No denominator of unsubmitted opportunities exists
notes: Do not convert visitation diagnostics to weights without an observed choice set

original_claim: Common support must be audited across habitat access shoreline season latitude protocol effort observer history and DFO coverage
stage4a_relevance: Protocol effort observer region time and distance support were audited; habitat access shoreline context and DFO survey coverage were not available
prospective_relevance: High before expanded models
evidence: Frozen support gates passed for SoG and conditionally for WCVI
notes: Do not infer missing overlap dimensions from passing model fits

original_claim: Tide daylight weather and survey conditions may confound timing
stage4a_relevance: Omitted time-varying conditions limit interpretation but no evidence supports a post hoc kitchen-sink repair
prospective_relevance: Potential small frozen sensitivity set
evidence: Stage 4A fixed calendar year protocol and effort but no tide weather or daylight terms
notes: Choose only mechanistically justified covariates before reopening outcomes

original_claim: Event start end midpoint interval and biological availability are distinct
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A uses a frozen representative midpoint or available endpoint and event-time bins; timing uncertainty models were deferred
prospective_relevance: Future timing sensitivity must be fixed without choosing preferred results
evidence: The protected link table was frozen from representative dates
notes: Do not relabel a later timing choice as Stage 4A prespecified

original_claim: A 45-model registry is not a small confirmatory primary claim set
stage4a_relevance: Stage 4A reduced activation to a locked 12-model system but did not define a small prospective endpoint hierarchy
prospective_relevance: Critical before prospective confirmation
evidence: Thirty-two models remained deferred and M31 locked
notes: Draft a small hierarchy and guardrails; do not activate deferred models based on favorable development results

original_claim: Response-derived nuisance quantities can leak prospective outcomes
stage4a_relevance: No evidence that Stage 4A used holdout-derived nuisance quantities; the 2026-2028 response remains locked
prospective_relevance: Critical for expertise sampling calibration and nuisance fitting
evidence: Current holdout rule prohibits response access and interim looks
notes: Require pre-period construction or cross-fitting and freeze before access
